raw_consumer_statement:
I have disputed transactions, double charges, by the time I get a repose its been over three months when I finally do get a response it was to let me know that they had denied my claim because it had been over 30 days, I've advice that it took them 3 months to respond so how is that my fault? literally had no response and just apologize said id still have to pay for something I did Not purchase more of a system error, from having a balance of about {$400.00} one moth the next bill was about $ XXXX I called to ask what was the purchases for? I asked for proof of purchase, itemized bill, they mentioned I was also late on my bill advice them I had paid my bill on time, they said after submitting minimum payment of the {$400.00} balance they day after my balance had gone up so my minimum had change I advice I didn't understand how was that possible and was also charge a late fee even though I paid my bill onetime. 
every time I called I get put on holds get transferred back and forth to different departments and no one can ever help me. I've requested itemized bill, they said they can just go over it while on the phone, I said no I need it in paper because they debt that I am being charge for is a big difference then what I believe I purchased, specially because 6 months prior I had paid in full. & the only big purchased I had made were XXXX sunglasses for {$370.00} and no other purchases had been made. No one has been able to help, I've been told I just need to pay for it to stop affecting my credit and an apology over the phone, now I am currently in collections Macys is the worst.
